hotel_description:
Golden Amour Hotel – A Romantic Hideaway in the Heart of Hanoi’s Old Quarter

Tucked away in the poetic streets of Hanoi’s Old Quarter, Golden Amour Hotel is a boutique retreat inspired by the timeless elegance of European neoclassical charm. With its graceful interiors, warm hues, and romantic ambiance, the hotel offers more than just a place to stay – it offers a story to be lived.

Each room is a carefully crafted haven where soft lighting, vintage touches, and tranquil vibes come together to create a sense of harmony and intimacy. Whether you're sipping tea by the balcony, listening to the city’s distant hum, or relaxing after a stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake, Golden Amour embraces you with quiet luxury and heartfelt hospitality.

From here, step into the soul of Hanoi: hidden alleyways, age-old cafes, local artisans, and the nostalgic rhythm of a city where the past and present meet.

Let your stay be more than a visit. Let it be a memory – full of grace, warmth
WELCOME TO GOLDEN AMOUR HOTEL

Nestled in the heart of Hue’s serene Thuan An coastal area, KOBI Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá offers a peaceful retreat with world-class wellness amenities and authentic Japanese-style hospitality. This 5-star resort features a signature Japanese Onsen area, a Ganban sauna with 4 distinct rooms, lush gardens, and Vietnamese – Japanese fusion cuisine at the on-site restaurant.

The resort provides a range of wellness and cultural experiences, including yoga classes, meditation sessions, herbal steam baths, and traditional tea ceremonies. A 24-hour front desk, airport transfers, and free Wi-Fi throughout the property ensure comfort and convenience from check-in to farewell.

All guest rooms and villas are air-conditioned and feature a private balcony or terrace with views of the garden, koi pond, or resort grounds. In-room amenities include a mini-bar, kettle, safety deposit box, flat-screen TV, and a private bathroom with a walk-in shower or Japanese soaking tub. Selected villas offer private Onsen experience for complete immersion in relaxation.

Guests can begin each morning with a nourishing breakfast buffet featuring Vietnamese, continental, and wellness-inspired options. Bicycle rentals are available for exploring nearby Ru Cha mangrove forest or the peaceful beach just minutes away. Whether seeking stillness, connection, or gentle adventure, KOBI Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá is your sanctuary of healing.

The resort is located just 4.3 mi from the UNESCO-listed Hue Imperial City and about 30 minutes from Phu Bai International Airport.

hotel_description:
Peace and quiet can be enjoyed at Bamboo Cottages, located on a private beach on Vung Bau Bay, Phu Quoc Island. This beautiful resort features sea views from all its rooms, as well as free wired internet and computers in the common area. Offering free kayaks and snorkeling equipment, guests can rent motorbikes to explore the island and visit Finger Nail Islet.

Enjoying cool sea breeze, all rooms and villas feature a private terrace with beach chairs. The private open-air bathrooms are equipped with a shower and solar-heated water.

Bamboo Cottages is 12 mi from Ganh Dau Bien Gioi, and 25 mi from Phu Quoc Domestic and International Airport and Duong Dong Market. From the domestic airport, it is a 50-minute flight to Ho Chi Minh or a 2-hour flight from Hanoi. Airport transfers can be arranged at an extra charge.

The on-site restaurant serves authentic home-made Vietnamese dishes prepared with fresh seafood and organic vegetables. Western meals are also available upon request. Drinks can be enjoyed at Bamboo Bar.

Guests can arrange a tour to Turtle Island or rent a boat for those who like to go out to sea. The resort also provides daily maid services, laundry services and luggage storage.

hotel_name: Ana Mandara Villas Dalat Resort & Spa
hotel_description:
For those who are inspired by history and style, look no further than Ana Mandara Villas Dalat Resort & Spa. It is one-of-a-kind hideaway yet centrally located treasure; tranquil and captivating sanctuary consisting of of 17 elegant villas with French architecture that date back to a century ago. Delicately blended in a lush landscape on top of a hill, Ana Mandara Villas Dalat Resort & Spa offers exceptional experiences in service, serenity and enjoyment.

For its classical charming architecture, charismatic interior and unerring attention to detail that offers unique experiences in simplicity, serenity and refinement, Ana Mandara Villas Dalat Resort & Spa has been repeatedly awarded as World Luxury Hotel Awards in 2018, Leading Luxury Mountain Resort in 2019, Travelers' Choice Awards in 2021 by TripAdvisor and other platforms.

The resort’s La Cochinchine Spa provides 5 treatment rooms with a wide range of therapeutic treatments including foot massage area and different sauna and steam baths. The resort operates a tour desk and 24-hour front desk, providing a range of services, including currency exchange, car rental and airport transfer.

If you’re looking for a luxurious and romantic dining experience, Le Petit Restaurant serves both Vietnamese & Western cuisine showcasing the freshest ingredients from Dalat and our own organic kitchen garden. Once a French colonial villa, Le Petit has maintained its classical design, becoming a destination dining experience. A brand new addition to Le Petit Private Dining Room is La Table Des Lys service, providing exceptional fine-dining experience for gourmets.

Guests can go exploring the surrounding landscaped areas and local culture and farming countryside. Within 1.9 mi, you can reach many popular points of interest of Da Lat, such as Lam Vien Square, Xuan Huong Lake and Dalat Flower Gardens. The nearest airport is Lien Khuong Airport, 14 mile away.

hotel_description:
Somerset Hoa Binh features apartments with fully-equipped kitchens and flat-screen cable TV. A spa offers massage services and a hot tub. The apartments feature a fitness center and restaurant.

Somerset Hoa Binh Hanoi is a 15-minute drive from Hanoi’s Old Quarter. The prime city centers of Hoan Kiem and Ba Dinh are a 10-minute drive away.

Apartments are fully furnished with seating and living areas. DVD players and a sound system are included. A washing machine is available in each apartment.

Guests can visit the DVD library for a source of entertainment. A children’s indoor playroom is available. Currency exchange and car rental services are provided for guests’ convenience. A complimentary shuttle bus to the city center is available to all in-house guests.

Japanese cuisine is served at Takara Restaurant. Alternatively, room service is available upon request.

Notice: Extensive road closures and traffic restrictions in the city center and surrounding areas in preparation for the 80th anniversary of the August Revolution and National Day celebrations on September 2nd.
